session.user: Run `make fast-ci` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report all failures (non-prettier ones). Focus on test failures and type errors. Ignore prettier/formatting failures - those are pre-existing. Report the count and names of failing tests.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results, focusing on test failures and type errors while ignoring prettier/formatting issues.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make fast-ci to check tests and type errors

Did you mean: 'pr_number'? tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_objective_save_to_issue.py:666: AttributeError FAILED tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_objective_save_to_issue.py::test_create_objective_comment_passes_validation - AttributeError: 'CreateObjectiveIssueResult' object has no attribute 'plan_number'. Did you mean: 'pr_number'? 1 failed, 6025 passed in 14.84s
session.assistant:
## Summary
**make fast-ci failed** with 1 test failure (ignoring prettier/formatting issues as requested):
### Test Failures: 1
**File:** `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_objective_save_to_issue.py`
**Test:** `test_create_objective_comment_passes_validation` (line 666)
**Error:** `AttributeError: 'CreateObjectiveIssueResult' object has no attribute 'plan_number'. Did you mean: 'pr_number'?`
The test is trying to access `result.plan_number` but the `CreateObjectiveIssueResult` object only has a `pr_number` attribute. This appears to be related to the gateway layer renaming mentioned in your branch name (plnd/O9109-rename-gateway-plan-03-13-1705) where `plan_number` parameters are being renamed to `pr_number`.
### Test Summary
- **Lint:** All checks passed - **Type checking (ty):** All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk):** 1 failed, 6025 passed - **Unit Tests (erk-dev):** 136 passed - **Unit Tests (erk-statusline):** 115 passed - **Unit Tests (erk-mcp):** 49 passed - **Total passing:** 6,325 tests - **Total failing:** 1 test
